title: Mapping Functions in Cache Memory
description: A flowchart illustrating the three primary cache mapping techniques (Direct, Associative, Set-Associative) and their decision process for placing a block from main memory into the cache.
relationships: Address is split into Tag, Index, and Block Offset
Index selects a specific cache line (Direct) or a set of lines (Set-Associative)
Tag is compared to all tags in the selected set
A hit occurs if a valid tag matches, a miss occurs if no match is found
